task: 修复 3 个 worker review finding：命令转义、staged sync 过滤、本地默认 loopback + 显式 LAN 鉴权；并通过定向回归与发布 gate
command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Invoke-Pester -Path @('.\\.Rayman\\scripts\\testing\\pester\\manage_workers.Tests.ps1','.\\.Rayman\\scripts\\testing\\pester\\worker_sync.Tests.ps1','.\\.Rayman\\scripts\\testing\\pester\\worker_host.Tests.ps1','.\\.Rayman\\scripts\\testing\\pester\\worker_common.Tests.ps1') -CI"; powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\\.Rayman\\scripts\\testing\\run_host_smoke.ps1 -WorkspaceRoot "$PWD"; powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\\.Rayman\\rayman.ps1 full-gate; pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\\.Rayman\\scripts\\release\\copy_smoke.ps1 -WorkspaceRoot "$PWD" -Strict -Scope host -TimeoutSeconds 180
constraints: 本文件为 Solution 级强制约束，必须执行。
本文件必须包含全部 Project requirements（按路径文本列出）。
CI 会校验：此文件必须包含上述每一条路径文本。
约定：Solution/Project requirements 均在 .RaymanAgent/ 下，不应在根目录出现 .*.requirements.md。
acceptance_criteria: Task goal remains: 修复 3 个 worker review finding：命令转义、staged sync 过滤、本地默认 loopback + 显式 LAN 鉴权；并通过定向回归与发布 gate
`manage_workers` 必须保留带空格路径/参数的 PowerShell 语义。
`worker_sync` staged bundle 不得包含 `.env`、`.codex/config.toml`、release zip、`.vscode/*` 与 gitignored 文件。
`worker_host` 默认仅允许 loopback 控制面；LAN 模式必须显式开启并要求 token。
定向 Pester、`run_host_smoke.ps1`、`full-gate`、strict host `copy_smoke` 必须通过。
Selected tool policy must be written before execution.
Doc gate must pass for the active pipeline stage.
stop_conditions: Stop immediately on policy block or missing required artifacts.
Keep the run in planner_v1 only when the doc gate remains satisfied.
Use local fallback when optional OpenAI runtime features are unavailable.
